name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions Nginx as a reverse proxy with multiple SSL-enabled virtual hosts (test.cluster.local, ci.cluster.local, status.cluster.local), full security hardening via UFW firewall, Fail2Ban intrusion prevention, SSH hardening, and kernel-level sysctl security tuning. Generates self-signed TLS certificates per virtual host and serves static HTML content per site.

name: cache
description: Deploys a dual-layer caching stack by installing and configuring both Memcached and Redis on a single node, with Redis configured for password authentication. Includes a post-install workaround to strip deprecated directives from the Redis config file written by the redisio community cookbook.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application by installing system packages, cloning the application from Git, creating a Python virtual environment, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, writing a .env file with database credentials, and registering a systemd service unit to run the application under uvicorn.
